message:
Fix broken locale layout: restore generateStaticParams and LocaleLayout

A concurrent agent edit replaced the generateStaticParams function
and LocaleLayout component definition with a placeholder comment
("// ... rest of imports and functions"), leaving a bare return
statement outside any function — an immediate build failure.

Restore the full component from the pre-breakage version (d88b041)
while keeping the MouseSpotlight import that was the intended
addition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
